shots.title: Selection UX — metaphor browser with preview + search
shots.notes: Added saveConfig(), METAPHOR_SCHEMA, and saveCustomMetaphor() to core. Validate, save, register, and activate custom metaphors in one call.

shots.title: Custom metaphor generation — LLM-powered vocabulary builder
shots.notes: Replaced free-text metaphor prompt in slope init --interactive with a numbered menu built from listMetaphors(), including a 'custom' option that prints agent generation instructions.

shots.title: CLI metaphor management — list, show, create, validate commands
shots.notes: Added metaphor module to MCP search tool returning schema, built-in list, and example definition. Added saveCustomMetaphor and saveConfig sandbox helpers with cwd pre-bound.

shots.title: MCP metaphor tools — search and generation via sandbox
shots.notes: Added slope metaphor list|set|show CLI command for metaphor management with [active] and [custom] markers.

conditions.description: First time building interactive metaphor selection UX and custom metaphor generation

nutrition.description: Build + typecheck + 1842 tests passing at completion. 22 new tests added.

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Smooth sprint. The metaphor system was already well-structured from earlier work — this sprint extended it with management tooling and interactive selection.
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: Custom metaphors are saved to .slope/metaphors/ and auto-registered. The METAPHOR_SCHEMA validates vocabulary completeness.
nineteenth_hole.what_surprised_you: No scorecard was filed — the post-hole routine was skipped after PR merge.
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: S42 (The Caddy Interview) extends the interactive init flow with smart defaults from the analyzer pipeline.

yardage_book_updates: src/core/metaphor.ts: saveCustomMetaphor(), METAPHOR_SCHEMA — custom metaphor persistence + validation
src/core/config.ts: saveConfig() — write config back to disk
slope init --interactive: numbered metaphor menu with custom option
MCP: metaphor module in search tool, saveCustomMetaphor + saveConfig sandbox helpers
course_management_notes: 4 tickets, par 4, score 4 — clean par with no hazards
Backfilled retroactively — scorecard was missed during original sprint execution
